framework.name: OpenAI GPT Actions as Current State-of-Art
framework.description: Casually mentions 'limited OAuth 2.0 support is enabled in some agent tools such as OpenAI GPT actions' — confirming that the actual shipping solution from major vendors is basic OAuth, not any sophisticated delegation chain.
framework.raw_quote: limited OAuth 2.0 support is enabled in some agent tools such as OpenAI GPT actions

source.title: Authenticated Delegation and Authorized AI Agents - arXiv
